title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: unixODBC bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for unixODBC is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The unixODBC packages contain a framework that supports accessing databases through the ODBC protocol.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): unixODBC overflows buffer if SQL returns error and causes the process to segfault [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-118425)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
full_text:
An update for unixODBC is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The unixODBC packages contain a framework that supports accessing databases through the ODBC protocol.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): unixODBC overflows buffer if SQL returns error and causes the process to segfault [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-118425)
